ingredients.name: Yoshinoya Musashi-Koyama
ingredients.localName: 吉野家 武蔵小山店
ingredients.address: 3 Chome-21-14 Koyama, Shinagawa City, Tokyo 142-0062, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Yoshinoya gyudon chain near Musashi-Koyama is part of the unglamorous neighborhood texture the series uses to ground Ichikawa's everyday life. It appears as a casual background eatery in the Senzoku/Koyama streetscape.

ingredients.name: Gastronomy “Joël Robuchon”
ingredients.localName: ガストロノミー “ジョエル・ロブション”
ingredients.type: グランメゾン（高級フランス料理店）
categories: グランメゾン（高級フランス料理店）
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒153-0062 Tokyo, Meguro City, Mita, 1 Chome−13−1, 恵比寿ガーデンプレイス内
ingredients.entityContext: The impossibly fancy Joël Robuchon restaurant at Ebisu Garden Place is where Ichikawa secretly imagines taking Yamada on a proper date; the laugh comes from the enormous gulf between his awkward middle-school budget and the restaurant's starred elegance. Ebisu Garden Place is a key pilgrimage cluster for Season 2.

ingredients.name: Meguro Shinkin Bank Senzoku Branch
ingredients.localName: 目黒信用金庫 洗足支店
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-26-5 Senzoku, Meguro City, Tokyo 152-0012, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Meguro Shinkin Bank at the Senzoku 2-chome intersection appears in background streetscape shots of the walk-home route Ichikawa and Yamada share. The corner is one of the most reproduced spots in pilgrimage photo guides for the series.

ingredients.name: Repark Senzoku 2-Chome
ingredients.localName: 三井のリパーク 洗足２丁目 駐車場
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-26-15 Senzoku, Meguro City, Tokyo 152-0012, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Mitsui Repark car park on the Senzoku 2-chome block is a recognized background in walk-home scenes, sitting just steps from the Senzoku Station area where the couple's daily walks play out.

ingredients.name: Senzoku Sta.
ingredients.localName: 洗足駅
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-21 Senzoku, Meguro City, Tokyo 152-0012, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Senzoku Station on the Tokyu Ikegami Line is Ichikawa and Yamada's shared commute hub, featured repeatedly as the spot where they part ways (or linger just a little too long) after school. Fans visit to recreate the heartfelt walk-home scenes that define the series.

ingredients.name: Idol On Stage
ingredients.localName: アイドルオンステージ
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒150-0001 Tokyo, Shibuya, Jingumae, 1 Chome−20−9 柴崎ビル
ingredients.entityContext: Idol On Stage photo shop on Takeshita Street in Harajuku appears in the episode where Ichikawa and Yamada go on a group outing to Harajuku, capturing the vibrant youth-culture character of the street the characters explore together.

ingredients.name: Takeshita Street Entrance Arch (Harajuku Station)
ingredients.localName: 竹下通り 入口アーチ (原宿駅)
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-19-11 Jingumae, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0001, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The iconic entrance arch of Takeshita Street is the unmistakable starting point for the Harajuku double-date episode, where Ichikawa and Yamada navigate the crowds side by side, in one of Season 2's most fan-beloved outings.

ingredients.name: Shinagawa Station
ingredients.localName: 品川駅
ingredients.address: 3 Chome-26-27 Takanawa, Minato City, Tokyo 108-0074, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Shinagawa Station serves as a transit point in scenes where characters travel within Tokyo, and is used as a backdrop in travel sequences in Season 2 when the group heads on longer outings away from the Senzoku neighborhood.

ingredients.name: Tomod's Senzoku Ekimae Store
ingredients.localName: トモズ 洗足駅前店
ingredients.address: 青柳ビル, 2 Chome-6-9 Senzoku, Meguro City, Tokyo 152-0012, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Tomod's drugstore right in front of Senzoku Station is a recurring neighborhood landmark in the series, passed by Ichikawa and Yamada on their daily walk home and used to establish the Senzoku streetscape.

ingredients.name: Closet Child Harajuku
ingredients.localName: クローゼットチャイルド原宿１号店
ingredients.address: 原宿丸一ビル 2F,3F, 1 Chome-6-11 Jingumae, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0001, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Closet Child's Harajuku branch, a popular used-lolita-fashion shop, appears during the Harajuku outing episode, reflecting the fashion-forward world Yamada inhabits as a model and the quirky shops the group visits together.

ingredients.name: Senzoku Police Box
ingredients.localName: 荏原警察署 洗足駐在所
ingredients.address: 7 Chome-12-3 Koyama, Shinagawa City, Tokyo 142-0062, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Ebihara Police substation (koban) on the Senzoku block is part of the faithful real-world streetscape the anime reproduces for Ichikawa and Yamada's walk-home route, and appears in background art for those scenes.

ingredients.name: CANDEO HOTELS Hiroshima Hatchobori
ingredients.localName: カンデオホテルズ広島八丁堀
ingredients.address: 14-1 Hatchobori, Naka Ward, Hiroshima, 730-0013, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Candeo Hotels Hiroshima Hatchobori is the real hotel that served as the model for the lodging where Yamada stays while filming a movie in the Onomichi/Hiroshima area in Season 2, despite the scenes being set closer to Onomichi.

ingredients.name: TOHO Cinemas Shibuya
ingredients.localName: TOHOシネマズ 渋谷
ingredients.address: 渋東シネタワ, 2 Chome-6-17 Dogenzaka, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0043, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: TOHO Cinemas Shibuya is the model for the movie theater where Ichikawa and Yamada go together, marking a pivotal moment as their first explicitly date-like outing in Season 2 and one of the series' most-referenced romantic milestones.

ingredients.name: Yamakiya Bedding Store
ingredients.localName: やまきや寝具店
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒164-0011 Tokyo, Nakano City, Central, 4 Chome−25−9
ingredients.entityContext: Yamakiya Bedding (ハセパン neighborhood) is a local shop that appears in the Senzoku residential streetscape shots, contributing to the hyper-specific neighborhood detail that makes the Senzoku pilgrimage so precise for fans.

ingredients.name: Fushimi Inari Taisha
ingredients.localName: 伏見稲荷大社
ingredients.address: 68 Fukakusa Yabunouchicho, Fushimi Ward, Kyoto, 612-0882, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Fushimi Inari Taisha is the Kyoto shrine where Ichikawa and Yamada visit during their school trip in the Season 2 finale arc, and where the emotional climax of their relationship plays out beneath the glowing torii gates at dusk. It is the single most iconic pilgrimage site for the series.

ingredients.name: Nekonote Sightseeing Pier
ingredients.localName: ネコノテ観光業船着場
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-10-3 Tsuchido, Onomichi, Hiroshima 722-0035, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Nekonote Sightseeing Pier in Onomichi, Hiroshima, is one of the locations featured during Yamada's movie-filming arc in Season 2, set against the scenic Onomichi harbor and its characteristic hillside landscape.

ingredients.name: Senbon Torii (Thousand Torii Gates)
ingredients.localName: 千本鳥居
ingredients.address: 68番地 Fukakusa Yabunouchicho, Fushimi Ward, Kyoto, 612-0882, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Senbon Torii, the dense tunnel of vermilion torii gates winding up the mountain at Fushimi Inari, is the exact setting for Ichikawa's long-awaited confession to Yamada in the Season 2 school-trip finale, the scene fans consider the series' most visually iconic moment.

ingredients.name: Auguste Rodin Sculpture: "The Spirit of Eternal Rest"
ingredients.localName: 「永遠なる休息の精」オーギュスト・ロダン
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-13 Mita, Meguro City, Tokyo 153-0062, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Rodin sculpture on the grounds of Ebisu Garden Place appears in the scenes where Ichikawa scouts the area while fantasizing about a date with Yamada. The European-courtyard atmosphere of the Garden Place makes it one of the most atmospheric pilgrimage stops in Ebisu.

ingredients.name: SoLaDo Takeshita-dori
ingredients.localName: ソラド 竹下通り
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-8-2 Jingumae, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0001, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The SoLaDo Takeshita-dori shopping complex on Takeshita Street is featured in the Harajuku outing episode, housing several of the shops the characters visit and recognizable from the distinctive exterior arc the anime faithfully reproduces.

ingredients.name: Kiyomizu-dera
ingredients.localName: 清水寺
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-294 Kiyomizu, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto, 605-0862, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Kiyomizu-dera, the famous wooden-stage temple in Higashiyama, Kyoto, is visited by the class during the school-trip arc in Season 2, appearing as one of the classic Kyoto sightseeing stops the characters experience together.

ingredients.name: Hachiko Square
ingredients.localName: ハチ公前広場
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-1 Dogenzaka, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0043, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Hachiko Square in front of Shibuya Station is where Ichikawa waits for Yamada on Christmas Eve for their holiday meetup, one of the most emotionally charged and fan-recalled scenes in Season 2, set at Tokyo's most iconic meeting spot.

ingredients.name: 7-Eleven Ebisu America Bridge Store
ingredients.localName: セブン-イレブン 恵比寿アメリカ橋店
ingredients.type: コンビニエンスストア
categories: コンビニエンスストア
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-25-1 Ebisuminami, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0022, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This 7-Eleven near the America Bridge (アメリカ橋) by Ebisu Garden Place shows up as a background convenience store in scenes set around Ebisu. It sits on the approach route fans walk when visiting the Garden Place pilgrimage cluster.

ingredients.name: Able Meguro Senzoku
ingredients.localName: エーブル目黒洗足
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒152-0012 Tokyo, Meguro City, Senzoku, 1 Chome−21−2
ingredients.entityContext: The Able real-estate office near Senzoku appears as a background building in scenes set along the walking route between school and Senzoku Station, part of the dense real-world accuracy the anime maintains for the Meguro neighborhood.

ingredients.name: Puratanasudori Bicycle
ingredients.localName: プラタナス自転車駐輪場付近
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-4-5 Mita, Meguro City, Tokyo 153-0062, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The bicycle parking area along the plane-tree boulevard near Ebisu Garden Place is part of the walk Ichikawa takes when he is mentally rehearsing how a date at the Garden Place might go. Matches the background art in the anime's Ebisu scouting sequence.

ingredients.name: Town Bakery Hasegawa
ingredients.localName: ハセパン
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-20-8 Haramachi, Meguro City, Tokyo 152-0011, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Hasegawa Bakery (ハセパン) near the Senzoku area is one of the neighborhood shops fans seek out as part of the Senzoku pilgrimage, representing the quiet residential side streets where Ichikawa and Yamada's daily walks take place.

ingredients.name: FamilyMart Haramachi 2-chome store
ingredients.localName: ファミリーマート 原町二丁目店
ingredients.type: コンビニエンスストア
categories: コンビニエンスストア
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-22-11 Haramachi, Meguro City, Tokyo 152-0011, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The FamilyMart on Haramachi 2-chome is one of the convenience store stops in the walk-home corridor used by Ichikawa and Yamada, and recognized in pilgrimage guides as a matching background location.

ingredients.name: Ebisu Station
ingredients.localName: 恵比寿駅
ingredients.address: 1-chōme-5 Ebisuminami, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0022, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Ebisu Station is the gateway to Ebisu Garden Place, the real-life model for the glamorous date location Ichikawa daydreams about in Season 2. Fans arrive here first when doing the Ebisu pilgrimage loop.

ingredients.name: Marion Crêpes Takeshita Street
ingredients.localName: マリオンクレープ 原宿竹下通り店
ingredients.address: ジュネスビル 1F, 1 Chome-6-15 Jingumae, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0001, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Marion Crêpes on Takeshita Street is the crepe shop the characters stop at during their Harajuku group outing, a small but sweet moment between Ichikawa and Yamada surrounded by the street's signature food stalls.

ingredients.name: Inari Station
ingredients.localName: 稲荷駅
ingredients.address: Fukakusa Inarionmaechō, Fushimi Ward, Kyoto, 612-0881, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Inari Station on the JR Nara Line is the closest station to Fushimi Inari Taisha, making it the arrival point for Ichikawa and Yamada's school-trip day at the shrine in Season 2. Fans doing the Fushimi Inari pilgrimage step off here.

ingredients.name: SWEETS PARADISE Harajuku
ingredients.localName: スイーツパラダイス 原宿店
ingredients.type: スイーツおよびデザート ビュッフェ
categories: スイーツおよびデザート ビュッフェ
ingredients.address: SoLaDo竹下通り 3F, 1 Chome-8-2 Jingumae, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0001, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Sweets Paradise on Takeshita Street is the dessert buffet the group visits during the Harajuku outing, providing an animated setting for group-date chaos and a memorable shared meal between Ichikawa, Yamada, and friends.

ingredients.name: Grace Estate
ingredients.localName: グレースエステート
ingredients.address: Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Grace Estate is a building used in the background of Senzoku neighborhood scenes, one of several real structures near the station that pilgrimage guides list as identifiable from the anime's streetscape art.

ingredients.name: Nara-miyage hyakka-shoten
ingredients.localName: 奈良みやげ百貨商店
ingredients.address: 23 Kasuganocho, Nara, 630-8212, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This Nara souvenir shop near Nara Park is the model for the shop where the characters browse omiyage gifts during the school trip to Nara in Season 2, a small but affectionate detail in the series' faithful recreation of real sightseeing spots.

ingredients.name: Onomichi Kyourakuen
ingredients.localName: 尾道 共楽園
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒722-0033 Hiroshima, Onomichi, Higashitsuchidocho, 13−17
ingredients.entityContext: Kyourakuen park in Onomichi is part of the scenic backdrop used during Yamada's film-shoot arc in Season 2, capturing the nostalgic, cinematic atmosphere of Onomichi that makes it a popular filming location in real life as well.

ingredients.name: Ginkgo Street Dental Clinic
ingredients.localName: いちょう通り歯科医院
ingredients.address: プレミール洗足 101, 7 Chome-15-21 Koyama, Shinagawa City, Tokyo 142-0062, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Ginkgo Street Dental Clinic is a neighborhood reference point in the Senzoku streetscape art, identifiable in background shots along the route the characters walk near the station.

ingredients.name: Ukigumo-enchi
ingredients.localName: 浮雲園地
ingredients.address: 23-2 Kasuganocho, Nara, 630-8212, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Ukigumo-enchi (Floating Cloud Garden) in Nara is one of the park areas visited during the class school trip to Nara in Season 2, set near Nara Park and Todai-ji and featured in scenes of the characters exploring the deer-filled grounds.

ingredients.name: Ramen Jiro Mita Honten
ingredients.localName: ラーメン二郎 三田本店
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-16-4 Mita, Minato City, Tokyo 108-0073, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Ramen Jiro's legendary flagship branch in Mita appears as the kind of intense, towering-bowl ramen shop that suits Ichikawa's solitary eating habits, grounding his character in real Tokyo food culture.

ingredients.name: Meguro Fudoson
ingredients.localName: 目黒不動尊
ingredients.address: 3 Chome-20-26 Shimomeguro, Meguro City, Tokyo 153-0064, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Meguro Fudoson (Ryusen-ji temple) is a historic Buddhist temple near the series' Meguro/Senzoku setting that serves as a neighborhood landmark and appears in establishing shots of the area the characters inhabit.
